command:
./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import subprocess,os,glob
# 1. current readers: no tool reads docs/payload-audit outputs
readers=subprocess.run(['git','grep','-ln','payload-audit','--','*.py','*.ps1','*.sh','*.yml'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip().splitlines()
readers=[r for r in readers if 'payload_audit_logger' not in r]
assert readers==[], readers
# 2. latest jsonl output is 2026-03-23
js=sorted(glob.glob('docs/payload-audit/*.jsonl'))
assert js and all('2026-03-23' in j for j in js), js
# 3. default-off env gate
src=open('governance_tools/payload_audit_logger.py',encoding='utf-8').read()
assert 'GOVERNANCE_PAYLOAD_AUDIT' in src and '\"0\") == \"1\"' in src.replace(chr(39),chr(34))
# 4. historical analysis readers exist
assert os.path.exists('docs/payload-audit/L0-baseline.md') and os.path.exists('docs/payload-audit/L1-baseline.md')
# 5. focused tests pass
t=subprocess.run(['./.venv/Scripts/python.exe','-m','pytest','tests/','-q','-k','payload_audit'],capture_output=True,text=True)
assert '40 passed' in t.stdout, t.stdout[-200:]
print('no current tool reader; jsonl frozen at 2026-03-23; default-off env gate confirmed; historical baseline analyses exist; 40 focused tests pass')
"
cannot_claim: semantic correctness of the tested behavior
receipt authenticity: every field is fabricatable by a direct writer
